creator: scottro@nyc.rr.com
text:
Another followup.  In the course of installing jdk, I had to install
urwfonts.  This created an X11R6/lib/fonts directory (I have X11BASE set
to /usr/local like the others with the problem.)

After that, acroread works.  It gives an error if I try to open a pdf
from a browser, saying failed to initialize the plugin, however, the pdf
file will open a moment later. 

I don't think this can even be considered a workaround, but it might
help someone who runs into the problem and desperately needs to open a
pdf file.

-- 

Scott Robbins
